examples: Get off the whirligig of management fads.
It is a very tacky whirligig with a little man who chops wood as the wind blows the propeller.
Maybe, the whirligig of time, who knows?
His first whirligig, which he built while he was overseas during WWII, was stolen.
He farmed and moved houses with trucks before opening the machine shop that eventually became whirligig central.
